overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a rustic waterfront lounge and adjacent dock area. The character enters a wooden bar with pool tables and neon lighting, exits around the building, and walks along a sandy shore with wooden shacks and an industrial waterfront visible across the water.

events.description: character reaches the doorway of the City Lounge and steps inside
transition from bright daylight to dimmer interior lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the lounge entrance across the dirt lot

entered.detail: single-story wooden building with CITY LOUNGE signage and horizontal siding
classic two-tone sedan parked near the entrance
wooden outdoor table with green painted metal legs

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wooden roadside lounge on a sunny day, walking across a dirt and grass lot. A red and white vintage car is parked to the left as the character enters the building through the front door.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bar interior with pool tables and booths

events.description: character turns left to walk toward the back of the bar, passing pool tables
character approaches the exit door at the rear of the lounge

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit bar, observing the pool tables and seated patrons before heading toward the exit

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the wooden bar counter
patron sitting in red booth with back to camera

entered.detail: green felt pool table with overhead hanging lamp
upholstered red bench seating along the walls
long wooden bar with bottles and glasses visible behind
purple neon illumination near the ceiling and back wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the lounge, the character walks past green pool tables and red upholstered booths under purple neon lighting. A bartender works behind the counter and a patron sits in a nearby booth as the character explores the space and heads toward the rear exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden deck patio behind the lounge

events.description: character exits the building onto the rear wooden deck
character turns right to follow the building perimeter toward the water

agents.ego_description: leaving through the back door and walking along the exterior wooden deck

entered.detail: elevated wooden platform with picnic tables and benches
wooden power pole with yellow bands and transformer

segments.scene_description: The character exits into bright daylight onto a wooden deck behind the lounge, passing picnic tables. The building wall is now on the right as the character walks toward the waterfront, with a utility pole visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy waterfront with wooden dock shacks

events.description: character steps off the wooden deck onto the sandy shore
character stops to look out at the water and industrial buildings across the river

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge, observing the dock shacks and industrial waterfront across the river

entered.detail: small weathered wooden huts on stilts near the water's edge
calm river water with gentle waves lapping at the sandy shore
large steel vertical-lift bridge spanning the river in the background
factory buildings and warehouses with smokestacks across the river

segments.scene_description: The character descends to a sandy beach and walks along the water's edge, passing wooden shacks on stilts. A large lift bridge and industrial buildings are visible across the calm river. The character pauses to look out at the water before continuing along the shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunny roadside lot through a neon-lit interior and out toward a wide industrial waterfront. It begins with the character crossing a dirt and grass lot past a vintage red and white car before entering the front door of a wooden lounge. As the camera moves inside, the bright daylight shifts to a dim atmosphere illuminated by purple neon lighting, passing green pool tables and red booths toward the rear exit. The scene then opens back into the sunlight as the character steps onto a wooden deck with picnic tables, moving alongside the building wall toward the coast. Finally, the camera descends to a sandy beach, passing wooden shacks on stilts to reveal a calm river with a large lift bridge and industrial buildings in the distance.
